dialogues: ♪♪ He's... He's awesome, honey.
I was so proud of myself when I thought of it...
He was in the phone book. How '80s is that?
Seriously, you bastards. We've been talking about it forever.
We're doing it. We're going to Cabo. Let's do it. Let's do it.
but made by Jay, which they love.
You know, she deserves it.
few drinks, no baby talk.
Haley wasn't throwing anything at me I hadn't seen before...
Did she just... I'm scared.
koreanHints: 2. 술 몇 잔 하고, 아기 얘기는 빼고요.
3. 헤일리가 내게 던진 건 전에 못 봤던 게 아니었어요...
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- deserve it : 그럴 자격이 있다, 그럴 만하다는 의미. 긍정적인 상황(칭찬, 보상)이나 부정적인 상황(처벌) 모두 사용 가능
- baby talk : 아기에 관한 대화. 어린 자녀를 둔 부모들이 항상 아이 얘기만 하는 것을 지칭할 때 자주 쓰는 표현
- throw something at someone : 누군가에게 무언가를 던지다. 비유적으로는 어려운 질문이나 상황을 제시하다는 의미
- I hadn't seen before : 전에 본 적 없는. 과거완료로 경험의 부재를 나타내며, 새로운 상황이 아니라는 뉘앙스 전달

dialogues: I mean, I don't know how they missed it.
There she'll get the structure and discipline she needs right now.
...that's twice as many visits.
...Paul was convinced I was having an affair...
Your line's crossed with a Chinese woman.
Oh, the lines are crossed. You're getting his calls.
...is he wearing a cape?
...because whoever was answering was always making boring chit-chat...
I mean, maybe it was somebody...
I assume he's not a high-talker.
koreanHints: 3. 그 사람은 늘 지루한 잡담만 하고 있더라고요.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- I don't know how they missed it : 명백한 것을 놓쳤을 때 쓰는 표현. "어떻게 그걸 못 봤는지 모르겠다"라는 뉘앙스로 실수나 간과에 대한 의아함을 나타냄
- Your line's crossed : 전화선이 교차되어 엉킨 상태. 요즘은 비유적으로 "의사소통이 꼬였다"는 의미로도 사용
- chit-chat : small talk보다 더 캐주얼한 표현으로 별 내용 없는 잡담을 의미. 동사로도 명사로도 사용 가능

sessions.episode: Friends - S08E01  The One After "I Do"
dialogues: Someone just take this away from me.
Thank you, thank you very much. Now if everone would please take your seats, dinner will be served.
The only thing left will be Radio. That's just for ugly people.
Well you know, it's a funny story. -Funny "ha-ha" or funny..(bursting sound)..oh?
Hey I thought you were at table six.
I mean, how's she..how's she gonna handle this financially?
Okay, fine, I'm a seven!
...supposedly, she was once quite the hotty of the plant world.
Oh! Come On. Mona Lisa! -Ahem. -Mona...
Better. Now just bend your arms a little more.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- take this away from me : 스스로 통제가 안 될 때 다른 사람에게 물건을 치워달라고 하는 표현. 유혹을 참기 힘들거나 자제력이 필요한 상황에서 자주 씀
- handle this financially : 경제적으로 감당하다, 재정적으로 처리하다. handle은 상황을 다루거나 대처한다는 뉘앙스
- Okay, fine : 마지못해 인정하거나 항복할 때 쓰는 표현. 약간 불만스럽지만 받아들인다는 뉘앙스

dialogues: What did you come in here for?
I'll take the test in here.
Jerry, don't do that. That is so annoying.
Well, uh, I've been looking forward to it.
cheating on an I.Q. test.
Nonsmoking would be great.
JERRY: He's serving Mexican, Italian, Chinese.
No, see, he's not smart.
Come on, George, open up.
It has a certain indefinable charm.
koreanHints: 2. 뭔가 딱 꼬집어 말할 수 없는 매력이 있어.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- That is so annoying : 일상에서 짜증나는 행동을 지적할 때 쓰는 직접적인 표현. so를 붙여 강조하면 더 자연스러움
- indefinable charm : 설명하기 어려운 매력을 표현할 때 쓰는 세련된 말. certain과 함께 쓰면 "뭔가 모를"이라는 뉘앙스
- Come on, open up : come on은 재촉이나 설득할 때, open up은 문을 열라는 직접적 의미와 마음을 열라는 이중 의미로 쓰임
